label: Think node job giver
description: Abstract base for all JobGiver_* classes. Provides optional localized report string overrides shown in the pawn's activity readout.

reportStringOverride.label: Report string override
reportStringOverride.description: Localized string shown in the pawn activity readout while this job giver is active. Overrides the default job label.

crawlingReportStringOverride.label: Crawling report string override
crawlingReportStringOverride.description: Localized string shown when the pawn is crawling and this job giver is active. Falls back to reportStringOverride when absent.
